/* Unified primary blue for enterprise consistency */ } /* ===== ENHANCED NTH-CHILD VARIATIONS ===== */ /* Expanded Fibonacci-based patterns for unique element treatments */ /* Fibonacci sequence positions: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21, 34, 55...

archivedPrinciples.principle: Line width scales has property: viewport - minimum 0
archivedPrinciples.description: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box ; min-width: 0; max-width: 100vw; } :root { /* === GOLDEN RATIO SYSTEM (φ = 1.618) === */ --phi: 1.618; --phi-inv: 0.618; --phi-mod: 1.618; /* Dynamic phi modifier based on viewport ratio */ /* === SQUARE DIAGONAL THEOREM SYSTEM (√2 ≈ 1.414) === */ /* Square diagonal: 2s² = c², therefore c = s√2 */ --sqrt2: 1.414213562; /* Square diagonal constant (√2) */ --sqrt2-inv: 0.707106781; /* Inverse √2 (1/√2) */ --sqrt2-half: 0.707106781; /* √2/2 = 1/√2 */ --sqrt2-double: 2.828427124; /* 2√2 */ /* Combined Phi-√2 Ratios */ --phi-sqrt2-product: 2.288245611; /* φ × √2 ≈ 2.288 (enhanced scaling) */ --phi-sqrt2-quotient: 1.144122806; /* φ / √2 ≈ 1.144 (balanced scaling) */ --sqrt2-phi-quotient: 0.874032049; /* √2 / φ ≈ 0.874 (inverse relationship) */ /* Diagonal Angles - Combining √2 (45°) with Phi Angles */ --diag-angle-1: 83.2deg; /* 38.2° + 45° = 83.2° (phi-azimuth-1 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-2: 106.8deg; /* 61.8° + 45° = 106.8° (phi-azimuth-2 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-3: 68.6deg; /* 23.6° + 45° = 68.6° (phi-azimuth-3 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-4: 121.4deg; /* 76.4° + 45° = 121.4° (phi-azimuth-4 + 45°) */ /* Diagonal Spacing Scale - Using √2 for compact spacing */ --space-diag-xs: clamp(0.18vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.25), 0.35vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.25 - ultra-compact */ --space-diag-sm: clamp(0.35vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.5), 0.7vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.5 - compact */ --space-diag-md: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.75), 1vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.75 - medium compact */ --space-diag-lg: clamp(0.7vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv)), 1.4vw); /* √2⁻¹ - standard diagonal */ --space-diag-xl: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2)), 2vw); /* √2 - expanded diagonal */ --space-diag-2xl: clamp(1.4vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2) * var(--sqrt2)), 2.8vw); /* √2² = 2 - large diagonal */ /* Square Grid Cell System - For diagonal layouts */ --grid-cell-diag: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2)); /* Diagonal grid cell based on √2 division */ --grid-cell-diag-v: calc(100vh / var(--sqrt2)); /* Vertical diagonal grid cell */ --grid-cell-square: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2) / var(--sqrt2)); /* Square cell: side = diagonal / √2 */ /* === VIEWPORT-RELATIVE BASE SYSTEM === */ /* Unified scaling base using viewport units */ --base: 1rem; --font-base: clamp(0.875rem, calc(1vw + 0.5vh), 1.125rem); /* Viewport-relative base font size with min/max bounds */ --zoom-scale: 1; /* Dynamic zoom scale for unified viewport scaling */ /* === SEMANTIC COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Each color has one job - meaning, not decoration */ /* ADDITIVE SEMANTICS: Colors accumulate meaning through context and combination */ /* Each color's semantic value is enhanced when combined with others, creating */ /* layered meaning that builds upon itself rather than replacing previous meaning */ /* Primary: Trust, expertise, primary actions */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Success: Completed actions, form submissions, positive states */ /* Mapped to primary color - unified system */ --color-success: var(--primary-color); --color-success-light: var(--primary-light); --color-success-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Warning: Important notices, attention required */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-warning: var(--primary-dark); --color-warning-light: var(--primary-light); --color-warning-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Error: Errors, failures (use sparingly) */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-error: var(--primary-dark); --color-error-light: var(--primary-light); --color-error-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Neutral: Secondary information, inactive states */ --color-neutral: #6B7280; --color-neutral-light: #F3F4F6; --color-neutral-dark: #4B5563; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for main text */ --text-secondary: #6b7280; /* Secondary text color */ --text-light: #9ca3af; /* Light text */ /* Background Colors - Reduced White Space */ --background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Off-white with subtle warmth - less stark than pure white */ --surface: var(--bg-tertiary); /* Slightly cooler off-white for surfaces */ --surface-elevated: var(--bg-elevated); /* Pure white for elevated cards - creates contrast */ --surface-accent: var(--bg-primary); /* Light blue tint for accent surfaces */ --dark-surface: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for dark surface */ /* Border Colors */ --border: #E2E8F0; /* Softer border */ --border-light: #EDF2F7; /* Very light border for subtle divisions */ /* Enhanced Shadow System - Depth Psychology */ --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); /* Subtle elevation */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-lg: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Authority through depth */ --shadow-primary: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.25); /* Primary color shadow - trust indicator */ --shadow-primary-lg: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.3); /* Border Radius - PHI Derived with Zoom Scaling */ --radius-sm: 0.5rem; /* 8px / 16 = 0.5rem - scales with zoom */ --border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px / 16 = 0.75rem - standard cards */ --radius-md: 1rem; /* 16px / 16 = 1rem - medium emphasis */ --radius-lg: 1.25rem; /* 20px / 16 = 1.25rem - large elements */ /* Transitions - PHI-Timed Animations */ --transition: all 0.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Phi-timed transition (0.618s) */ --transition-fast: all 0.382s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382s */ --transition-slow: all 1.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ-timed slow transition (1.618s) */ /* Opacity System - Unified, Restrained (4 Key Values) */ /* Reduced opacity values for professional, non-invasive appearance */ --opacity-subtle: 0.03; /* Very subtle - background patterns (reduced from 0.02) */ --opacity-soft: 0.08; /* Soft elements - unified from light/soft (reduced from 0.04/0.06) */ --opacity-medium: 0.15; /* Medium emphasis (reduced from 0.12) */ --opacity-strong: 0.3; /* Strong emphasis (reduced from 0.25) */ --opacity-full: 1; /* Full opacity */ /* Legacy mappings for backward compatibility */ --opacity-light: var(--opacity-soft); /* Gradient Stop Positions - Golden Ratio */ /* Using golden ratio for gradient stop positions creates visual harmony */ --gradient-stop-1: 0%; /* Start */ --gradient-stop-2: 38.2%; /* φ⁻² ≈ 38.2% */ --gradient-stop-3: 61.8%; /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 61.8% */ --gradient-stop-4: 100%; /* End */ /* === CONSISTENT DESIGN SYSTEM === */ /* Typography Scale - PHI Scaled with Viewport-Relative Base */ /* Using golden ratio (1.618) for harmonious typography hierarchy */ --text-xs: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.75); /* 0.75 × base */ --text-sm: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.875); /* 0.875 × base */ --text-base: var(--font-base); /* Base font size */ --text-lg: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ ≈ 1.618 × base */ --text-xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ² ≈ 2.618 × base */ --text-2xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ³ ≈ 4.236 × base */ --text-3xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ⁴ ≈ 6.854 × base */ /* Alternative practical scale for readability - now viewport-relative */ --text-lg-practical: clamp(1.125rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.125), 1.5rem); /* 18px - practical readable size */ --text-xl-practical: clamp(1.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.25), 1.75rem); /* 20px */ --text-2xl-practical: clamp(1.5rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.5), 2rem); /* 24px */ --text-3xl-practical: clamp(1.875rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.875), 2.5rem); /* 30px */ --text-4xl-practical: clamp(2.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 2.25), 3rem); /* 36px */ --text-5xl-practical: clamp(3rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 3), 4rem); /* 48px */ /* Heading Typography - Phi Modular Scale */ --font-h1: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² scale */ --font-h2: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* φ scale */ --font-h3: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi-sqrt)); /* √φ scale */ /* Font Weight Scale - Standardized */ --font-weight-normal: 400; /* Normal text */ --font-weight-medium: 500; /* Medium emphasis */ --font-weight-semibold: 600; /* Semibold - cards, buttons */ --font-weight-bold: 700; /* Bold - headings, emphasis */ --font-weight-extrabold: 800; /* Extrabold - hero titles only */ /* Spacing Scale - PHI Derived with Viewport-Relative Units (vh/vw) */ /* All spacing uses vh/vw for proportional scaling across all viewport sizes */ /* Base viewport unit: 1vh = vertical spacing, 1vw = horizontal spacing */ --vbase: calc(1vh + 1vw); /* Combined viewport base for balanced scaling */ --space-1: calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5); /* Base × φ × 0.5 - viewport-relative */ --space-2: calc(var(--space-1) * var(--phi)); /* Base × φ² - viewport-relative */ --space-xs: clamp(0.25vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.5), 0.5vw); /* φ⁻⁴ scaled - minimum 0.25vh, maximum 0.5vw */ --space-sm: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.75), 1vw); /* φ⁻³ scaled - minimum 0.5vh, maximum 1vw */ --space-md: clamp(0.75vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-half) * 0.5), 1.5vw); /* φ⁻² scaled - minimum 0.75vh, maximum 1.5vw */ --space-lg: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * 0.5), 2vw); /* Base unit - φ⁰ = 1 - minimum 1vh, maximum 2vw */ --space-xl: clamp(1.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(2vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ - golden ratio spacing - minimum 1.618vh, maximum 2vw × φ */ --space-2xl: clamp(2.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(4vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ² - minimum 2.618vh, maximum 4vw × φ */ --space-3xl: clamp(4.236vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * 0.5), calc(6vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ³ - minimum 4.236vh, maximum 6vw × φ */ --space-4xl: clamp(6.854vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(8vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁴ - minimum 6.854vh, maximum 8vw × φ */ --space-5xl: clamp(11.09vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(12vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁵ - minimum 11.09vh, maximum 12vw × φ */ --space-6xl: clamp(17.944vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(16vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁶ - minimum 17.944vh, maximum 16vw × φ */ /* PHI Derivative Variations for Element Sizing */ /* Congruence phi - maintaining proportional relationships */ /* Tucker's coefficient of factor congruence with phi symmetry */ --phi-sqrt: 1.272; /* √φ ≈ 1.272 - subtle variation */ --phi-cubed: 4.236; /* φ³ ≈ 4.236 - strong variation */ --phi-half: 0.809; /* φ/2 ≈ 0.809 - gentle reduction */ --phi-quarter: 0.4045; /* φ/4 ≈ 0.4045 - minimal variation */ --phi-two-thirds: 1.079; /* (2φ)/3 ≈ 1.079 - intermediate variation */ --phi-three-quarters: 1.2135; /* (3φ)/4 ≈ 1.2135 - moderate variation */ --phi-one-point-five: 2.427; /* 1.5φ ≈ 2.427 - enhanced variation */ /* Congruence Phi Symmetry - maintaining proportional harmony */ /* Elements maintain phi relationships while allowing individual sizing */ --congruence-phi-1: calc(var(--phi) * 0.618); /* φ × φ⁻¹ = 1 - perfect congruence */ --congruence-phi-2: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi-inv) * var(--phi)); /* Layered congruence for nested elements */ /* Golden Ratio Positioning Variables */ /* For structural positioning relationships, not just spacing */ --phi-ratio: 61.8%; /* Golden ratio proportion (φ⁻¹) */ --phi-ratio-inv: 38.2%; /* Inverse golden ratio (φ⁻²) */ /* === PHI-BASED DESIGN LINES, TANGENTS, AND LATERALS === */ /* Structural design elements using golden ratio geometry */ /* Phi Lines - Golden ratio division lines for structural alignment */ --phi-line-width: clamp(0.5px, calc(0.1vw * var(--phi-inv)), 2px); /* Line width scales with viewport - minimum 0.5px, maximum 2px (enhanced) */ --phi-line-opacity: 0.3; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - subtle, non-invasive */ /* Phi Tangents - Curved lines following golden ratio spiral */ --phi-tangent-radius: calc(100vh * var(--phi-ratio)); /* Tangent radius based on viewport height × phi ratio */ --phi-tangent-opacity: 0.2; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement */ /* Phi Laterals - Horizontal/vertical lines at phi divisions */ --phi-lateral-position-v: var(--phi-ratio); /* Vertical lateral at 61.8% */ --phi-lateral-position-h: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* Horizontal lateral at 38.2% */ --phi-lateral-opacity: var(--opacity-strong); /* Enhanced visibility for laterals */ /* Angular/Azimuth Phi Laterals - Diagonal lines at phi-based angles */ --phi-azimuth-1: 38.2deg; /* First angular lateral angle - inverse phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-2: 61.8deg; /* Second angular lateral angle - phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-3: 23.6deg; /* Third angular lateral angle - phi² angle (φ⁻² × 100) */ --phi-azimuth-4: 76.4deg; /* Fourth angular lateral angle - phi + inverse phi (φ + φ⁻¹) */ --phi-azimuth-opacity: 0.15; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - very subtle */ --phi-azimuth-1-rad: calc(38.2deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 1 in radians for calculations */ --phi-azimuth-2-rad: calc(61.8deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 2 in radians for calculations */ /* Phi Grid System - For structural alignment */ --phi-grid-cell-v: calc(100vh / var(--phi)); /* Vertical grid cells based on phi division */ --phi-grid-cell-h: calc(100vw / var(--phi)); /* Horizontal grid cells based on phi division */ /* Phi Spiral Points - Key positions along golden spiral */ --phi-spiral-1: 0%; /* Origin */ --phi-spiral-2: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* 38.2% - first phi division */ --phi-spiral-3: var(--phi-ratio); /* 61.8% - second phi division */ --phi-spiral-4: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv) * var(--phi-inv)); /* 76.4% - third phi division */ --phi-spiral-5: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv)); /* 100% - full cycle */ /* Harmonic Tension Variables - For per-letter semantic styling */ --harmonic-phase-base: 0; --harmonic-tension: var(--phi-inv); /* Base tension value */ --harmonic-frequency: var(--phi); /* Frequency multiplier for harmonic patterns */ /* Wave function system removed - simplified design system */ /* Button Sizes */ --btn-sm: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); /* 12px 16px */ --btn-md: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl); /* 12px 24px */ --btn-lg: var(--space-lg) var(--space-2xl); /* 16px 32px */ /* Icon Sizes */ --icon-sm: 1rem; /* 16px */ --icon-md: 1.25rem; /* 20px */ --icon-lg: 1.5rem; /* 24px */ --icon-xl: 2rem; /* 32px */ /* === IMPORTANCE-BASED SIZING HIERARCHY === */ /* Sizing supersedes by importance - more important = larger */ /* Applied with additive semantics: size + color = combined meaning */ /* Importance Levels - Phi-scaled sizing */ --importance-critical: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ³ ≈ 4.236× - Most important elements (hero titles, primary CTAs) */ --importance-high: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² ≈ 2.618× - High importance (section titles, key cards) */ --importance-medium: var(--phi); /* φ ≈ 1.618× - Medium importance (card titles, buttons) */ --importance-normal: 1; /* Base - Normal importance (body text, secondary elements) */ --importance-low: var(--phi-inv); /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 0.618× - Low importance (captions, metadata) */ --importance-minimal: calc(var(--phi-inv) * var(--phi-inv)); export class StateManager { private state: AppState; private observers: Set<StateObserver> = new Set(); private frameUpdateTimer: number | null = null; constructor() { const initialFrame = this.getCurrentFrame(); } setGeometricState(updates: Partial<GeometricState>): void { this.updateState({ geometric: { ...this.state.geometric, ...updates } }); } private notifyObservers(): void { this.observers.forEach(observer => { try { observer(this.state); archivedPrinciples.description: **Opacity**: Wave functions create visual rhythm ## Building Forward All blocks are designed to be: - **Modular**: Can be combined in any permutation - **Scalable**: Phi-based proportions work at all viewport sizes - **Semantic**: Each block carries meaning through color and structure - **Ciphered**: All elements use wave function encoding - **Vectorized**: Stored for data extraction and analysis ## Conclusion The design blocks system creates a comprehensive, all-encompassing web presence where: - Every element is ciphered using wave functions - All blocks are vectorized and stored for data extraction - Multiple permutations create unique visual signatures - Azimuth-based design provides full coverage - Color psychology and semantic levels preserve meaning - Phi principles ensure proportional harmony This foundation allows for infinite expansion while maintaining uniformity, meaning, and mathematical precision throughout the entire website.

archivedPrinciples.principle: transition is transform 0
archivedPrinciples.description: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box ; min-width: 0; max-width: 100vw; } :root { /* === GOLDEN RATIO SYSTEM (φ = 1.618) === */ --phi: 1.618; --phi-inv: 0.618; --phi-mod: 1.618; /* Dynamic phi modifier based on viewport ratio */ /* === SQUARE DIAGONAL THEOREM SYSTEM (√2 ≈ 1.414) === */ /* Square diagonal: 2s² = c², therefore c = s√2 */ --sqrt2: 1.414213562; /* Square diagonal constant (√2) */ --sqrt2-inv: 0.707106781; /* Inverse √2 (1/√2) */ --sqrt2-half: 0.707106781; /* √2/2 = 1/√2 */ --sqrt2-double: 2.828427124; /* 2√2 */ /* Combined Phi-√2 Ratios */ --phi-sqrt2-product: 2.288245611; /* φ × √2 ≈ 2.288 (enhanced scaling) */ --phi-sqrt2-quotient: 1.144122806; /* φ / √2 ≈ 1.144 (balanced scaling) */ --sqrt2-phi-quotient: 0.874032049; /* √2 / φ ≈ 0.874 (inverse relationship) */ /* Diagonal Angles - Combining √2 (45°) with Phi Angles */ --diag-angle-1: 83.2deg; /* 38.2° + 45° = 83.2° (phi-azimuth-1 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-2: 106.8deg; /* 61.8° + 45° = 106.8° (phi-azimuth-2 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-3: 68.6deg; /* 23.6° + 45° = 68.6° (phi-azimuth-3 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-4: 121.4deg; /* 76.4° + 45° = 121.4° (phi-azimuth-4 + 45°) */ /* Diagonal Spacing Scale - Using √2 for compact spacing */ --space-diag-xs: clamp(0.18vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.25), 0.35vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.25 - ultra-compact */ --space-diag-sm: clamp(0.35vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.5), 0.7vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.5 - compact */ --space-diag-md: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.75), 1vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.75 - medium compact */ --space-diag-lg: clamp(0.7vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv)), 1.4vw); /* √2⁻¹ - standard diagonal */ --space-diag-xl: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2)), 2vw); /* √2 - expanded diagonal */ --space-diag-2xl: clamp(1.4vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2) * var(--sqrt2)), 2.8vw); /* √2² = 2 - large diagonal */ /* Square Grid Cell System - For diagonal layouts */ --grid-cell-diag: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2)); /* Diagonal grid cell based on √2 division */ --grid-cell-diag-v: calc(100vh / var(--sqrt2)); /* Vertical diagonal grid cell */ --grid-cell-square: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2) / var(--sqrt2)); /* Square cell: side = diagonal / √2 */ /* === VIEWPORT-RELATIVE BASE SYSTEM === */ /* Unified scaling base using viewport units */ --base: 1rem; --font-base: clamp(0.875rem, calc(1vw + 0.5vh), 1.125rem); /* Viewport-relative base font size with min/max bounds */ --zoom-scale: 1; /* Dynamic zoom scale for unified viewport scaling */ /* === SEMANTIC COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Each color has one job - meaning, not decoration */ /* ADDITIVE SEMANTICS: Colors accumulate meaning through context and combination */ /* Each color's semantic value is enhanced when combined with others, creating */ /* layered meaning that builds upon itself rather than replacing previous meaning */ /* Primary: Trust, expertise, primary actions */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Success: Completed actions, form submissions, positive states */ /* Mapped to primary color - unified system */ --color-success: var(--primary-color); --color-success-light: var(--primary-light); --color-success-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Warning: Important notices, attention required */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-warning: var(--primary-dark); --color-warning-light: var(--primary-light); --color-warning-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Error: Errors, failures (use sparingly) */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-error: var(--primary-dark); --color-error-light: var(--primary-light); --color-error-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Neutral: Secondary information, inactive states */ --color-neutral: #6B7280; --color-neutral-light: #F3F4F6; --color-neutral-dark: #4B5563; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for main text */ --text-secondary: #6b7280; /* Secondary text color */ --text-light: #9ca3af; /* Light text */ /* Background Colors - Reduced White Space */ --background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Off-white with subtle warmth - less stark than pure white */ --surface: var(--bg-tertiary); /* Slightly cooler off-white for surfaces */ --surface-elevated: var(--bg-elevated); /* Pure white for elevated cards - creates contrast */ --surface-accent: var(--bg-primary); /* Light blue tint for accent surfaces */ --dark-surface: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for dark surface */ /* Border Colors */ --border: #E2E8F0; /* Softer border */ --border-light: #EDF2F7; /* Very light border for subtle divisions */ /* Enhanced Shadow System - Depth Psychology */ --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); /* Subtle elevation */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-lg: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Authority through depth */ --shadow-primary: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.25); /* Primary color shadow - trust indicator */ --shadow-primary-lg: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.3); /* Border Radius - PHI Derived with Zoom Scaling */ --radius-sm: 0.5rem; /* 8px / 16 = 0.5rem - scales with zoom */ --border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px / 16 = 0.75rem - standard cards */ --radius-md: 1rem; /* 16px / 16 = 1rem - medium emphasis */ --radius-lg: 1.25rem; /* 20px / 16 = 1.25rem - large elements */ /* Transitions - PHI-Timed Animations */ --transition: all 0.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Phi-timed transition (0.618s) */ --transition-fast: all 0.382s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382s */ --transition-slow: all 1.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ-timed slow transition (1.618s) */ /* Opacity System - Unified, Restrained (4 Key Values) */ /* Reduced opacity values for professional, non-invasive appearance */ --opacity-subtle: 0.03; /* Very subtle - background patterns (reduced from 0.02) */ --opacity-soft: 0.08; /* Soft elements - unified from light/soft (reduced from 0.04/0.06) */ --opacity-medium: 0.15; /* Medium emphasis (reduced from 0.12) */ --opacity-strong: 0.3; /* Strong emphasis (reduced from 0.25) */ --opacity-full: 1; /* Full opacity */ /* Legacy mappings for backward compatibility */ --opacity-light: var(--opacity-soft); /* Gradient Stop Positions - Golden Ratio */ /* Using golden ratio for gradient stop positions creates visual harmony */ --gradient-stop-1: 0%; /* Start */ --gradient-stop-2: 38.2%; /* φ⁻² ≈ 38.2% */ --gradient-stop-3: 61.8%; /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 61.8% */ --gradient-stop-4: 100%; /* End */ /* === CONSISTENT DESIGN SYSTEM === */ /* Typography Scale - PHI Scaled with Viewport-Relative Base */ /* Using golden ratio (1.618) for harmonious typography hierarchy */ --text-xs: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.75); /* 0.75 × base */ --text-sm: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.875); /* 0.875 × base */ --text-base: var(--font-base); /* Base font size */ --text-lg: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ ≈ 1.618 × base */ --text-xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ² ≈ 2.618 × base */ --text-2xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ³ ≈ 4.236 × base */ --text-3xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ⁴ ≈ 6.854 × base */ /* Alternative practical scale for readability - now viewport-relative */ --text-lg-practical: clamp(1.125rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.125), 1.5rem); /* 18px - practical readable size */ --text-xl-practical: clamp(1.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.25), 1.75rem); /* 20px */ --text-2xl-practical: clamp(1.5rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.5), 2rem); /* 24px */ --text-3xl-practical: clamp(1.875rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.875), 2.5rem); /* 30px */ --text-4xl-practical: clamp(2.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 2.25), 3rem); /* 36px */ --text-5xl-practical: clamp(3rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 3), 4rem); /* 48px */ /* Heading Typography - Phi Modular Scale */ --font-h1: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² scale */ --font-h2: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* φ scale */ --font-h3: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi-sqrt)); /* √φ scale */ /* Font Weight Scale - Standardized */ --font-weight-normal: 400; /* Normal text */ --font-weight-medium: 500; /* Medium emphasis */ --font-weight-semibold: 600; /* Semibold - cards, buttons */ --font-weight-bold: 700; /* Bold - headings, emphasis */ --font-weight-extrabold: 800; /* Extrabold - hero titles only */ /* Spacing Scale - PHI Derived with Viewport-Relative Units (vh/vw) */ /* All spacing uses vh/vw for proportional scaling across all viewport sizes */ /* Base viewport unit: 1vh = vertical spacing, 1vw = horizontal spacing */ --vbase: calc(1vh + 1vw); /* Combined viewport base for balanced scaling */ --space-1: calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5); /* Base × φ × 0.5 - viewport-relative */ --space-2: calc(var(--space-1) * var(--phi)); /* Base × φ² - viewport-relative */ --space-xs: clamp(0.25vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.5), 0.5vw); /* φ⁻⁴ scaled - minimum 0.25vh, maximum 0.5vw */ --space-sm: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.75), 1vw); /* φ⁻³ scaled - minimum 0.5vh, maximum 1vw */ --space-md: clamp(0.75vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-half) * 0.5), 1.5vw); /* φ⁻² scaled - minimum 0.75vh, maximum 1.5vw */ --space-lg: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * 0.5), 2vw); /* Base unit - φ⁰ = 1 - minimum 1vh, maximum 2vw */ --space-xl: clamp(1.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(2vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ - golden ratio spacing - minimum 1.618vh, maximum 2vw × φ */ --space-2xl: clamp(2.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(4vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ² - minimum 2.618vh, maximum 4vw × φ */ --space-3xl: clamp(4.236vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * 0.5), calc(6vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ³ - minimum 4.236vh, maximum 6vw × φ */ --space-4xl: clamp(6.854vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(8vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁴ - minimum 6.854vh, maximum 8vw × φ */ --space-5xl: clamp(11.09vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(12vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁵ - minimum 11.09vh, maximum 12vw × φ */ --space-6xl: clamp(17.944vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(16vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁶ - minimum 17.944vh, maximum 16vw × φ */ /* PHI Derivative Variations for Element Sizing */ /* Congruence phi - maintaining proportional relationships */ /* Tucker's coefficient of factor congruence with phi symmetry */ --phi-sqrt: 1.272; /* √φ ≈ 1.272 - subtle variation */ --phi-cubed: 4.236; /* φ³ ≈ 4.236 - strong variation */ --phi-half: 0.809; /* φ/2 ≈ 0.809 - gentle reduction */ --phi-quarter: 0.4045; /* φ/4 ≈ 0.4045 - minimal variation */ --phi-two-thirds: 1.079; /* (2φ)/3 ≈ 1.079 - intermediate variation */ --phi-three-quarters: 1.2135; /* (3φ)/4 ≈ 1.2135 - moderate variation */ --phi-one-point-five: 2.427; /* 1.5φ ≈ 2.427 - enhanced variation */ /* Congruence Phi Symmetry - maintaining proportional harmony */ /* Elements maintain phi relationships while allowing individual sizing */ --congruence-phi-1: calc(var(--phi) * 0.618); /* φ × φ⁻¹ = 1 - perfect congruence */ --congruence-phi-2: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi-inv) * var(--phi)); /* Layered congruence for nested elements */ /* Golden Ratio Positioning Variables */ /* For structural positioning relationships, not just spacing */ --phi-ratio: 61.8%; /* Golden ratio proportion (φ⁻¹) */ --phi-ratio-inv: 38.2%; /* Inverse golden ratio (φ⁻²) */ /* === PHI-BASED DESIGN LINES, TANGENTS, AND LATERALS === */ /* Structural design elements using golden ratio geometry */ /* Phi Lines - Golden ratio division lines for structural alignment */ --phi-line-width: clamp(0.5px, calc(0.1vw * var(--phi-inv)), 2px); /* Line width scales with viewport - minimum 0.5px, maximum 2px (enhanced) */ --phi-line-opacity: 0.3; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - subtle, non-invasive */ /* Phi Tangents - Curved lines following golden ratio spiral */ --phi-tangent-radius: calc(100vh * var(--phi-ratio)); /* Tangent radius based on viewport height × phi ratio */ --phi-tangent-opacity: 0.2; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement */ /* Phi Laterals - Horizontal/vertical lines at phi divisions */ --phi-lateral-position-v: var(--phi-ratio); /* Vertical lateral at 61.8% */ --phi-lateral-position-h: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* Horizontal lateral at 38.2% */ --phi-lateral-opacity: var(--opacity-strong); /* Enhanced visibility for laterals */ /* Angular/Azimuth Phi Laterals - Diagonal lines at phi-based angles */ --phi-azimuth-1: 38.2deg; /* First angular lateral angle - inverse phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-2: 61.8deg; /* Second angular lateral angle - phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-3: 23.6deg; /* Third angular lateral angle - phi² angle (φ⁻² × 100) */ --phi-azimuth-4: 76.4deg; /* Fourth angular lateral angle - phi + inverse phi (φ + φ⁻¹) */ --phi-azimuth-opacity: 0.15; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - very subtle */ --phi-azimuth-1-rad: calc(38.2deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 1 in radians for calculations */ --phi-azimuth-2-rad: calc(61.8deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 2 in radians for calculations */ /* Phi Grid System - For structural alignment */ --phi-grid-cell-v: calc(100vh / var(--phi)); /* Vertical grid cells based on phi division */ --phi-grid-cell-h: calc(100vw / var(--phi)); /* Horizontal grid cells based on phi division */ /* Phi Spiral Points - Key positions along golden spiral */ --phi-spiral-1: 0%; /* Origin */ --phi-spiral-2: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* 38.2% - first phi division */ --phi-spiral-3: var(--phi-ratio); /* 61.8% - second phi division */ --phi-spiral-4: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv) * var(--phi-inv)); /* 76.4% - third phi division */ --phi-spiral-5: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv)); /* 100% - full cycle */ /* Harmonic Tension Variables - For per-letter semantic styling */ --harmonic-phase-base: 0; --harmonic-tension: var(--phi-inv); /* Base tension value */ --harmonic-frequency: var(--phi); /* Frequency multiplier for harmonic patterns */ /* Wave function system removed - simplified design system */ /* Button Sizes */ --btn-sm: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); /* 12px 16px */ --btn-md: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl); /* 12px 24px */ --btn-lg: var(--space-lg) var(--space-2xl); /* 16px 32px */ /* Icon Sizes */ --icon-sm: 1rem; /* 16px */ --icon-md: 1.25rem; /* 20px */ --icon-lg: 1.5rem; /* 24px */ --icon-xl: 2rem; /* 32px */ /* === IMPORTANCE-BASED SIZING HIERARCHY === */ /* Sizing supersedes by importance - more important = larger */ /* Applied with additive semantics: size + color = combined meaning */ /* Importance Levels - Phi-scaled sizing */ --importance-critical: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ³ ≈ 4.236× - Most important elements (hero titles, primary CTAs) */ --importance-high: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² ≈ 2.618× - High importance (section titles, key cards) */ --importance-medium: var(--phi); /* φ ≈ 1.618× - Medium importance (card titles, buttons) */ --importance-normal: 1; /* Base - Normal importance (body text, secondary elements) */ --importance-low: var(--phi-inv); /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 0.618× - Low importance (captions, metadata) */ --importance-minimal: calc(var(--phi-inv) * var(--phi-inv)); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382× - Minimal importance (fine print, disclaimers) */ /* Size Multipliers for Elements by Importance */ --size-hero-title: var(--importance-critical); /* Most important - largest */ --size-section-title: var(--importance-high); /* High importance - large */ --size-card-title: var(--importance-medium); /* Medium importance - moderate */ --size-body-text: var(--importance-normal); /* Normal importance - base */ --size-caption: var(--importance-low); /* Low importance - smaller */ --size-disclaimer: var(--importance-minimal); /* Minimal importance - smallest */ /* Color Intensity by Importance - Additive Semantics */ /* Colors become more prevalent as importance increases */ --color-intensity-critical: 1; /* Full color saturation for critical elements */ --color-intensity-high: var(--opacity-strong); /* 61.8% opacity - strong color presence */ --color-intensity-medium: var(--opacity-medium); /* 38.2% opacity - medium color presence */ --color-intensity-normal: var(--opacity-soft); /* 10% opacity - subtle color presence */ --color-intensity-low: var(--opacity-light); /* 6.18% opacity - minimal color presence */ /* Background Color Variations - Reducing White Space */ --bg-primary: var(--primary-ultra-light); /* Primary background - very light blue tint */ --bg-secondary: #FAFBFC; /* Secondary background - off-white with subtle warmth */ --bg-tertiary: #F8F9FA; /* Tertiary background - slightly cooler off-white */ --bg-accent: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-ultra-light) 0%, #F0F7FF 100%); /* Accent background - subtle gradient */ --bg-elevated: #FFFFFF; /* Elevated surfaces - pure white for contrast */ /* === UNIFIED COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Single color palette: Primary + Neutral for all applications */ /* Colors applied uniquely per page while maintaining unified scheme */ /* Primary Blue - Authority, Trust, Expertise (Unified) */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Color Accent System - Unified Primary */ --accent-primary: var(--primary-color); /* Primary accent - trust, expertise */ --accent-primary-bg: rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--color-intensity-medium)); /* Primary background accent - 12% opacity */ /* Legacy color mappings - unified to primary/neutral */ /* Wisdom/Purple → Primary Dark (for authority/philosophy sections) */ --color-wisdom: var(--primary-dark); --color-wisdom-light: var(--primary-light); --color-wisdom-dark: var(--primary-dark); --color-wisdom-ultra-light: var(--primary-ultra-light); --accent-wisdom: var(--primary-dark); --accent-wisdom-bg: rgba(8, 85, 168, var(--color-intensity-normal)); /* Calm Blue → Primary Light (for forms/contact sections) */ --color-calm: var(--primary-color); --color-calm-light: var(--primary-light); --color-calm-dark: var(--primary-dark); --accent-calm: var(--primary-color); --accent-calm-bg: rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--color-intensity-normal)); /* Unified Gradients - Enterprise Grade */ --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-ultra-light) 0%, var(--primary-light) 50%, var(--primary-ultra-light) 100% ); /* Subtle, unified gradient */ /* Legacy gradient mapping */ --gradient-wisdom-subtle: var(--gradient-primary); } html { overflow-x: hidden; width: 100vw; position: relative; /* Enable natural browser zoom - we work with it using viewport units */ -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -moz-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Base font size uses viewport-relative units for unified scaling */ font-size: var(--font-base); } /* Unified zoom wrapper - scales entire site as one unit */ body { overflow-x: hidden; width: 100vw; position: relative; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; /* Flexbox layout to push footer to bottom */ font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; line-height: calc(1em * var(--phi)); /* Line height uses phi ratio for proportional harmony */ color: var(--text-primary); background: var(--bg-accent); /* Subtle gradient background - reduces white space */ background-color: var(--background); /* Fallback solid color */ padding-top: 0; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; text-rendering: optimizeLegibility; letter-spacing: -0.011em; /* Base font size uses viewport-relative variable for unified scaling */ font-size: var(--font-base); transform-origin: center; /* Center origin for uniform scaling */ font-weight: var(--font-weight-normal); } /* Heading Styles - Standardized Typography */ h1, .h1 { font-size: var(--font-h1); font-weight: var(--font-weight-extrabold); line-height: calc(1em * var(--phi)); } h2, .h2 { font-size: var(--font-h2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); line-height: calc(1em * var(--phi)); } h3, .h3 { font-size: var(--font-h3); font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold); line-height: calc(1em * var(--phi)); } h4, .h4 { font-size: var(--text-lg); font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold); line-height: calc(1em * var(--phi)); } h5, .h5 { font-size: var(--text-base); font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); archivedPrinciples.description: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box ; min-width: 0; max-width: 100vw; } :root { /* === GOLDEN RATIO SYSTEM (φ = 1.618) === */ --phi: 1.618; --phi-inv: 0.618; --phi-mod: 1.618; /* Dynamic phi modifier based on viewport ratio */ /* === SQUARE DIAGONAL THEOREM SYSTEM (√2 ≈ 1.414) === */ /* Square diagonal: 2s² = c², therefore c = s√2 */ --sqrt2: 1.414213562; /* Square diagonal constant (√2) */ --sqrt2-inv: 0.707106781; /* Inverse √2 (1/√2) */ --sqrt2-half: 0.707106781; /* √2/2 = 1/√2 */ --sqrt2-double: 2.828427124; /* 2√2 */ /* Combined Phi-√2 Ratios */ --phi-sqrt2-product: 2.288245611; /* φ × √2 ≈ 2.288 (enhanced scaling) */ --phi-sqrt2-quotient: 1.144122806; /* φ / √2 ≈ 1.144 (balanced scaling) */ --sqrt2-phi-quotient: 0.874032049; /* √2 / φ ≈ 0.874 (inverse relationship) */ /* Diagonal Angles - Combining √2 (45°) with Phi Angles */ --diag-angle-1: 83.2deg; /* 38.2° + 45° = 83.2° (phi-azimuth-1 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-2: 106.8deg; /* 61.8° + 45° = 106.8° (phi-azimuth-2 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-3: 68.6deg; /* 23.6° + 45° = 68.6° (phi-azimuth-3 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-4: 121.4deg; /* 76.4° + 45° = 121.4° (phi-azimuth-4 + 45°) */ /* Diagonal Spacing Scale - Using √2 for compact spacing */ --space-diag-xs: clamp(0.18vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.25), 0.35vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.25 - ultra-compact */ --space-diag-sm: clamp(0.35vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.5), 0.7vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.5 - compact */ --space-diag-md: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.75), 1vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.75 - medium compact */ --space-diag-lg: clamp(0.7vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv)), 1.4vw); /* √2⁻¹ - standard diagonal */ --space-diag-xl: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2)), 2vw); /* √2 - expanded diagonal */ --space-diag-2xl: clamp(1.4vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2) * var(--sqrt2)), 2.8vw); /* √2² = 2 - large diagonal */ /* Square Grid Cell System - For diagonal layouts */ --grid-cell-diag: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2)); /* Diagonal grid cell based on √2 division */ --grid-cell-diag-v: calc(100vh / var(--sqrt2)); /* Vertical diagonal grid cell */ --grid-cell-square: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2) / var(--sqrt2)); /* Square cell: side = diagonal / √2 */ /* === VIEWPORT-RELATIVE BASE SYSTEM === */ /* Unified scaling base using viewport units */ --base: 1rem; --font-base: clamp(0.875rem, calc(1vw + 0.5vh), 1.125rem); /* Viewport-relative base font size with min/max bounds */ --zoom-scale: 1; /* Dynamic zoom scale for unified viewport scaling */ /* === SEMANTIC COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Each color has one job - meaning, not decoration */ /* ADDITIVE SEMANTICS: Colors accumulate meaning through context and combination */ /* Each color's semantic value is enhanced when combined with others, creating */ /* layered meaning that builds upon itself rather than replacing previous meaning */ /* Primary: Trust, expertise, primary actions */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Success: Completed actions, form submissions, positive states */ /* Mapped to primary color - unified system */ --color-success: var(--primary-color); --color-success-light: var(--primary-light); --color-success-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Warning: Important notices, attention required */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-warning: var(--primary-dark); --color-warning-light: var(--primary-light); --color-warning-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Error: Errors, failures (use sparingly) */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-error: var(--primary-dark); --color-error-light: var(--primary-light); --color-error-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Neutral: Secondary information, inactive states */ --color-neutral: #6B7280; --color-neutral-light: #F3F4F6; --color-neutral-dark: #4B5563; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for main text */ --text-secondary: #6b7280; /* Secondary text color */ --text-light: #9ca3af; /* Light text */ /* Background Colors - Reduced White Space */ --background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Off-white with subtle warmth - less stark than pure white */ --surface: var(--bg-tertiary); /* Slightly cooler off-white for surfaces */ --surface-elevated: var(--bg-elevated); /* Pure white for elevated cards - creates contrast */ --surface-accent: var(--bg-primary); /* Light blue tint for accent surfaces */ --dark-surface: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for dark surface */ /* Border Colors */ --border: #E2E8F0; /* Softer border */ --border-light: #EDF2F7; /* Very light border for subtle divisions */ /* Enhanced Shadow System - Depth Psychology */ --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); /* Subtle elevation */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-lg: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Authority through depth */ --shadow-primary: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.25); /* Primary color shadow - trust indicator */ --shadow-primary-lg: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.3); /* Border Radius - PHI Derived with Zoom Scaling */ --radius-sm: 0.5rem; /* 8px / 16 = 0.5rem - scales with zoom */ --border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px / 16 = 0.75rem - standard cards */ --radius-md: 1rem; /* 16px / 16 = 1rem - medium emphasis */ --radius-lg: 1.25rem; /* 20px / 16 = 1.25rem - large elements */ /* Transitions - PHI-Timed Animations */ --transition: all 0.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Phi-timed transition (0.618s) */ --transition-fast: all 0.382s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382s */ --transition-slow: all 1.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ-timed slow transition (1.618s) */ /* Opacity System - Unified, Restrained (4 Key Values) */ /* Reduced opacity values for professional, non-invasive appearance */ --opacity-subtle: 0.03; /* Very subtle - background patterns (reduced from 0.02) */ --opacity-soft: 0.08; /* Soft elements - unified from light/soft (reduced from 0.04/0.06) */ --opacity-medium: 0.15; /* Medium emphasis (reduced from 0.12) */ --opacity-strong: 0.3; archivedPrinciples.principle: color has one job - meaning
archivedPrinciples.description: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box ; min-width: 0; max-width: 100vw; } :root { /* === GOLDEN RATIO SYSTEM (φ = 1.618) === */ --phi: 1.618; --phi-inv: 0.618; --phi-mod: 1.618; /* Dynamic phi modifier based on viewport ratio */ /* === SQUARE DIAGONAL THEOREM SYSTEM (√2 ≈ 1.414) === */ /* Square diagonal: 2s² = c², therefore c = s√2 */ --sqrt2: 1.414213562; /* Square diagonal constant (√2) */ --sqrt2-inv: 0.707106781; /* Inverse √2 (1/√2) */ --sqrt2-half: 0.707106781; /* √2/2 = 1/√2 */ --sqrt2-double: 2.828427124; /* 2√2 */ /* Combined Phi-√2 Ratios */ --phi-sqrt2-product: 2.288245611; /* φ × √2 ≈ 2.288 (enhanced scaling) */ --phi-sqrt2-quotient: 1.144122806; /* φ / √2 ≈ 1.144 (balanced scaling) */ --sqrt2-phi-quotient: 0.874032049; /* √2 / φ ≈ 0.874 (inverse relationship) */ /* Diagonal Angles - Combining √2 (45°) with Phi Angles */ --diag-angle-1: 83.2deg; /* 38.2° + 45° = 83.2° (phi-azimuth-1 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-2: 106.8deg; /* 61.8° + 45° = 106.8° (phi-azimuth-2 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-3: 68.6deg; /* 23.6° + 45° = 68.6° (phi-azimuth-3 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-4: 121.4deg; /* 76.4° + 45° = 121.4° (phi-azimuth-4 + 45°) */ /* Diagonal Spacing Scale - Using √2 for compact spacing */ --space-diag-xs: clamp(0.18vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.25), 0.35vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.25 - ultra-compact */ --space-diag-sm: clamp(0.35vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.5), 0.7vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.5 - compact */ --space-diag-md: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.75), 1vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.75 - medium compact */ --space-diag-lg: clamp(0.7vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv)), 1.4vw); /* √2⁻¹ - standard diagonal */ --space-diag-xl: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2)), 2vw); /* √2 - expanded diagonal */ --space-diag-2xl: clamp(1.4vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2) * var(--sqrt2)), 2.8vw); /* √2² = 2 - large diagonal */ /* Square Grid Cell System - For diagonal layouts */ --grid-cell-diag: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2)); /* Diagonal grid cell based on √2 division */ --grid-cell-diag-v: calc(100vh / var(--sqrt2)); /* Vertical diagonal grid cell */ --grid-cell-square: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2) / var(--sqrt2)); /* Square cell: side = diagonal / √2 */ /* === VIEWPORT-RELATIVE BASE SYSTEM === */ /* Unified scaling base using viewport units */ --base: 1rem; --font-base: clamp(0.875rem, calc(1vw + 0.5vh), 1.125rem); /* Viewport-relative base font size with min/max bounds */ --zoom-scale: 1; /* Dynamic zoom scale for unified viewport scaling */ /* === SEMANTIC COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Each color has one job - meaning, not decoration */ /* ADDITIVE SEMANTICS: Colors accumulate meaning through context and combination */ /* Each color's semantic value is enhanced when combined with others, creating */ /* layered meaning that builds upon itself rather than replacing previous meaning */ /* Primary: Trust, expertise, primary actions */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Success: Completed actions, form submissions, positive states */ /* Mapped to primary color - unified system */ --color-success: var(--primary-color); --color-success-light: var(--primary-light); --color-success-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Warning: Important notices, attention required */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-warning: var(--primary-dark); --color-warning-light: var(--primary-light); --color-warning-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Error: Errors, failures (use sparingly) */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-error: var(--primary-dark); --color-error-light: var(--primary-light); --color-error-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Neutral: Secondary information, inactive states */ --color-neutral: #6B7280; --color-neutral-light: #F3F4F6; --color-neutral-dark: #4B5563; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for main text */ --text-secondary: #6b7280; /* Secondary text color */ --text-light: #9ca3af; /* Light text */ /* Background Colors - Reduced White Space */ --background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Off-white with subtle warmth - less stark than pure white */ --surface: var(--bg-tertiary); /* Slightly cooler off-white for surfaces */ --surface-elevated: var(--bg-elevated); /* Pure white for elevated cards - creates contrast */ --surface-accent: var(--bg-primary); /* Light blue tint for accent surfaces */ --dark-surface: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for dark surface */ /* Border Colors */ --border: #E2E8F0; /* Softer border */ --border-light: #EDF2F7; /* Very light border for subtle divisions */ /* Enhanced Shadow System - Depth Psychology */ --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); /* Subtle elevation */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-lg: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Authority through depth */ --shadow-primary: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.25); /* Primary color shadow - trust indicator */ --shadow-primary-lg: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.3); /* Border Radius - PHI Derived with Zoom Scaling */ --radius-sm: 0.5rem; /* 8px / 16 = 0.5rem - scales with zoom */ --border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px / 16 = 0.75rem - standard cards */ --radius-md: 1rem; /* 16px / 16 = 1rem - medium emphasis */ --radius-lg: 1.25rem; /* 20px / 16 = 1.25rem - large elements */ /* Transitions - PHI-Timed Animations */ --transition: all 0.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Phi-timed transition (0.618s) */ --transition-fast: all 0.382s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382s */ --transition-slow: all 1.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ-timed slow transition (1.618s) */ /* Opacity System - Unified, Restrained (4 Key Values) */ /* Reduced opacity values for professional, non-invasive appearance */ --opacity-subtle: 0.03; /* Very subtle - background patterns (reduced from 0.02) */ --opacity-soft: 0.08; /* Soft elements - unified from light/soft (reduced from 0.04/0.06) */ --opacity-medium: 0.15; /* Medium emphasis (reduced from 0.12) */ --opacity-strong: 0.3; /* Strong emphasis (reduced from 0.25) */ --opacity-full: 1; /* Full opacity */ /* Legacy mappings for backward compatibility */ --opacity-light: var(--opacity-soft); /* Gradient Stop Positions - Golden Ratio */ /* Using golden ratio for gradient stop positions creates visual harmony */ --gradient-stop-1: 0%; /* Start */ --gradient-stop-2: 38.2%; /* φ⁻² ≈ 38.2% */ --gradient-stop-3: 61.8%; /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 61.8% */ --gradient-stop-4: 100%; /* End */ /* === CONSISTENT DESIGN SYSTEM === */ /* Typography Scale - PHI Scaled with Viewport-Relative Base */ /* Using golden ratio (1.618) for harmonious typography hierarchy */ --text-xs: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.75); /* 0.75 × base */ --text-sm: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.875); /* 0.875 × base */ --text-base: var(--font-base); /* Base font size */ --text-lg: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ ≈ 1.618 × base */ --text-xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ² ≈ 2.618 × base */ --text-2xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ³ ≈ 4.236 × base */ --text-3xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ⁴ ≈ 6.854 × base */ /* Alternative practical scale for readability - now viewport-relative */ --text-lg-practical: clamp(1.125rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.125), 1.5rem); /* 18px - practical readable size */ --text-xl-practical: clamp(1.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.25), 1.75rem); /* 20px */ --text-2xl-practical: clamp(1.5rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.5), 2rem); /* 24px */ --text-3xl-practical: clamp(1.875rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.875), 2.5rem); /* 30px */ --text-4xl-practical: clamp(2.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 2.25), 3rem); /* 36px */ --text-5xl-practical: clamp(3rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 3), 4rem); /* 48px */ /* Heading Typography - Phi Modular Scale */ --font-h1: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² scale */ --font-h2: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* φ scale */ --font-h3: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi-sqrt)); /* √φ scale */ /* Font Weight Scale - Standardized */ --font-weight-normal: 400; /* Normal text */ --font-weight-medium: 500; /* Medium emphasis */ --font-weight-semibold: 600; /* Semibold - cards, buttons */ --font-weight-bold: 700; /* Bold - headings, emphasis */ --font-weight-extrabold: 800; /* Extrabold - hero titles only */ /* Spacing Scale - PHI Derived with Viewport-Relative Units (vh/vw) */ /* All spacing uses vh/vw for proportional scaling across all viewport sizes */ /* Base viewport unit: 1vh = vertical spacing, 1vw = horizontal spacing */ --vbase: calc(1vh + 1vw); /* Combined viewport base for balanced scaling */ --space-1: calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5); /* Base × φ × 0.5 - viewport-relative */ --space-2: calc(var(--space-1) * var(--phi)); /* Base × φ² - viewport-relative */ --space-xs: clamp(0.25vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.5), 0.5vw); /* φ⁻⁴ scaled - minimum 0.25vh, maximum 0.5vw */ --space-sm: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.75), 1vw); /* φ⁻³ scaled - minimum 0.5vh, maximum 1vw */ --space-md: clamp(0.75vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-half) * 0.5), 1.5vw); /* φ⁻² scaled - minimum 0.75vh, maximum 1.5vw */ --space-lg: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * 0.5), 2vw); /* Base unit - φ⁰ = 1 - minimum 1vh, maximum 2vw */ --space-xl: clamp(1.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(2vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ - golden ratio spacing - minimum 1.618vh, maximum 2vw × φ */ --space-2xl: clamp(2.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(4vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ² - minimum 2.618vh, maximum 4vw × φ */ --space-3xl: clamp(4.236vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * 0.5), calc(6vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ³ - minimum 4.236vh, maximum 6vw × φ */ --space-4xl: clamp(6.854vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(8vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁴ - minimum 6.854vh, maximum 8vw × φ */ --space-5xl: clamp(11.09vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(12vw * var(--phi))); /* Reduced by 30% for more subtle patterns */ } .bg-pattern-light { opacity: calc(var(--opacity-soft) * 0.6); /* Reduced by 40% - unified to opacity-soft */ } .bg-pattern-soft { opacity: calc(var(--opacity-soft) * 0.65); /* Reduced by 35% */ } /* ===== ENHANCED PHI LINES & TANGENTS ===== */ /* Additional structural elements for dead space reduction */ /* Enhanced vertical phi lines */ .phi-line-vertical { position: absolute; left: var(--phi-ratio); top: 0; width: var(--phi-line-width); height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--opacity-subtle)) var(--phi-spiral-2), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 1.5)) var(--phi-spiral-3), rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--opacity-subtle)) var(--phi-spiral-4), transparent 100% ); /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement */ opacity: calc(var(--phi-lateral-opacity) * 0.5); /* Further reduced for horizontal laterals */ pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } .phi-lateral-horizontal-inv { top: var(--phi-ratio); } /* Curved tangents following golden spiral - Enterprise Refined */ .phi-tangent { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: radial-gradient( ellipse 150% 100% at var(--phi-ratio) 50%, transparent 0%, rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--opacity-subtle)) var(--phi-spiral-1), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 1.5)) var(--phi-spiral-2), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 2)) var(--phi-spiral-3), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 1.5)) var(--phi-spiral-4), transparent 100% ); top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: linear-gradient( var(--phi-azimuth-1), transparent 0%, transparent calc(var(--phi-ratio-inv) * 100% - 1px), rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--opacity-subtle)) calc(var(--phi-ratio-inv) * 100%), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 1.5)) calc(var(--phi-ratio-inv) * 100% + 1px), transparent calc(var(--phi-ratio-inv) * 100% + 2px) ); /* Unified primary blue for enterprise consistency */ opacity: var(--phi-azimuth-opacity); pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } .phi-lateral-angular-2 { background: linear-gradient( var(--phi-azimuth-2), transparent 0%, transparent calc(var(--phi-ratio) * 100% - 1px), rgba(10, 116, 218, var(--opacity-subtle)) calc(var(--phi-ratio) * 100%), rgba(10, 116, 218, calc(var(--opacity-subtle) * 1.5)) calc(var(--phi-ratio) * 100% + 1px), transparent calc(var(--phi-ratio) * 100% + 2px) ); /* Unified primary blue for enterprise consistency */ } /* ===== ENHANCED NTH-CHILD VARIATIONS ===== */ /* Expanded Fibonacci-based patterns for unique element treatments */ /* Fibonacci sequence positions: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21, 34, 55...

archivedPrinciples.principle: Line width scales has property: viewport - minimum 0
archivedPrinciples.description: * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box ; min-width: 0; max-width: 100vw; } :root { /* === GOLDEN RATIO SYSTEM (φ = 1.618) === */ --phi: 1.618; --phi-inv: 0.618; --phi-mod: 1.618; /* Dynamic phi modifier based on viewport ratio */ /* === SQUARE DIAGONAL THEOREM SYSTEM (√2 ≈ 1.414) === */ /* Square diagonal: 2s² = c², therefore c = s√2 */ --sqrt2: 1.414213562; /* Square diagonal constant (√2) */ --sqrt2-inv: 0.707106781; /* Inverse √2 (1/√2) */ --sqrt2-half: 0.707106781; /* √2/2 = 1/√2 */ --sqrt2-double: 2.828427124; /* 2√2 */ /* Combined Phi-√2 Ratios */ --phi-sqrt2-product: 2.288245611; /* φ × √2 ≈ 2.288 (enhanced scaling) */ --phi-sqrt2-quotient: 1.144122806; /* φ / √2 ≈ 1.144 (balanced scaling) */ --sqrt2-phi-quotient: 0.874032049; /* √2 / φ ≈ 0.874 (inverse relationship) */ /* Diagonal Angles - Combining √2 (45°) with Phi Angles */ --diag-angle-1: 83.2deg; /* 38.2° + 45° = 83.2° (phi-azimuth-1 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-2: 106.8deg; /* 61.8° + 45° = 106.8° (phi-azimuth-2 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-3: 68.6deg; /* 23.6° + 45° = 68.6° (phi-azimuth-3 + 45°) */ --diag-angle-4: 121.4deg; /* 76.4° + 45° = 121.4° (phi-azimuth-4 + 45°) */ /* Diagonal Spacing Scale - Using √2 for compact spacing */ --space-diag-xs: clamp(0.18vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.25), 0.35vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.25 - ultra-compact */ --space-diag-sm: clamp(0.35vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.5), 0.7vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.5 - compact */ --space-diag-md: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv) * 0.75), 1vw); /* √2⁻¹ × 0.75 - medium compact */ --space-diag-lg: clamp(0.7vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2-inv)), 1.4vw); /* √2⁻¹ - standard diagonal */ --space-diag-xl: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2)), 2vw); /* √2 - expanded diagonal */ --space-diag-2xl: clamp(1.4vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--sqrt2) * var(--sqrt2)), 2.8vw); /* √2² = 2 - large diagonal */ /* Square Grid Cell System - For diagonal layouts */ --grid-cell-diag: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2)); /* Diagonal grid cell based on √2 division */ --grid-cell-diag-v: calc(100vh / var(--sqrt2)); /* Vertical diagonal grid cell */ --grid-cell-square: calc(100vw / var(--sqrt2) / var(--sqrt2)); /* Square cell: side = diagonal / √2 */ /* === VIEWPORT-RELATIVE BASE SYSTEM === */ /* Unified scaling base using viewport units */ --base: 1rem; --font-base: clamp(0.875rem, calc(1vw + 0.5vh), 1.125rem); /* Viewport-relative base font size with min/max bounds */ --zoom-scale: 1; /* Dynamic zoom scale for unified viewport scaling */ /* === SEMANTIC COLOR SYSTEM === */ /* Each color has one job - meaning, not decoration */ /* ADDITIVE SEMANTICS: Colors accumulate meaning through context and combination */ /* Each color's semantic value is enhanced when combined with others, creating */ /* layered meaning that builds upon itself rather than replacing previous meaning */ /* Primary: Trust, expertise, primary actions */ --primary-color: #0A74DA; --primary-dark: #0855A8; --primary-light: #F0F7FF; --primary-ultra-light: #FAFCFF; /* Success: Completed actions, form submissions, positive states */ /* Mapped to primary color - unified system */ --color-success: var(--primary-color); --color-success-light: var(--primary-light); --color-success-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Warning: Important notices, attention required */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-warning: var(--primary-dark); --color-warning-light: var(--primary-light); --color-warning-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Error: Errors, failures (use sparingly) */ /* Mapped to primary-dark - unified system */ --color-error: var(--primary-dark); --color-error-light: var(--primary-light); --color-error-dark: var(--primary-dark); /* Neutral: Secondary information, inactive states */ --color-neutral: #6B7280; --color-neutral-light: #F3F4F6; --color-neutral-dark: #4B5563; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for main text */ --text-secondary: #6b7280; /* Secondary text color */ --text-light: #9ca3af; /* Light text */ /* Background Colors - Reduced White Space */ --background: var(--bg-secondary); /* Off-white with subtle warmth - less stark than pure white */ --surface: var(--bg-tertiary); /* Slightly cooler off-white for surfaces */ --surface-elevated: var(--bg-elevated); /* Pure white for elevated cards - creates contrast */ --surface-accent: var(--bg-primary); /* Light blue tint for accent surfaces */ --dark-surface: #1A1A1A; /* Charcoal Black for dark surface */ /* Border Colors */ --border: #E2E8F0; /* Softer border */ --border-light: #EDF2F7; /* Very light border for subtle divisions */ /* Enhanced Shadow System - Depth Psychology */ --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); /* Subtle elevation */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-md: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-lg: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Authority through depth */ --shadow-primary: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.25); /* Primary color shadow - trust indicator */ --shadow-primary-lg: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(10, 116, 218, 0.3); /* Border Radius - PHI Derived with Zoom Scaling */ --radius-sm: 0.5rem; /* 8px / 16 = 0.5rem - scales with zoom */ --border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px / 16 = 0.75rem - standard cards */ --radius-md: 1rem; /* 16px / 16 = 1rem - medium emphasis */ --radius-lg: 1.25rem; /* 20px / 16 = 1.25rem - large elements */ /* Transitions - PHI-Timed Animations */ --transition: all 0.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Phi-timed transition (0.618s) */ --transition-fast: all 0.382s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ⁻² ≈ 0.382s */ --transition-slow: all 1.618s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* φ-timed slow transition (1.618s) */ /* Opacity System - Unified, Restrained (4 Key Values) */ /* Reduced opacity values for professional, non-invasive appearance */ --opacity-subtle: 0.03; /* Very subtle - background patterns (reduced from 0.02) */ --opacity-soft: 0.08; /* Soft elements - unified from light/soft (reduced from 0.04/0.06) */ --opacity-medium: 0.15; /* Medium emphasis (reduced from 0.12) */ --opacity-strong: 0.3; /* Strong emphasis (reduced from 0.25) */ --opacity-full: 1; /* Full opacity */ /* Legacy mappings for backward compatibility */ --opacity-light: var(--opacity-soft); /* Gradient Stop Positions - Golden Ratio */ /* Using golden ratio for gradient stop positions creates visual harmony */ --gradient-stop-1: 0%; /* Start */ --gradient-stop-2: 38.2%; /* φ⁻² ≈ 38.2% */ --gradient-stop-3: 61.8%; /* φ⁻¹ ≈ 61.8% */ --gradient-stop-4: 100%; /* End */ /* === CONSISTENT DESIGN SYSTEM === */ /* Typography Scale - PHI Scaled with Viewport-Relative Base */ /* Using golden ratio (1.618) for harmonious typography hierarchy */ --text-xs: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.75); /* 0.75 × base */ --text-sm: calc(var(--font-base) * 0.875); /* 0.875 × base */ --text-base: var(--font-base); /* Base font size */ --text-lg: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ ≈ 1.618 × base */ --text-xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ² ≈ 2.618 × base */ --text-2xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ³ ≈ 4.236 × base */ --text-3xl: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* base × φ⁴ ≈ 6.854 × base */ /* Alternative practical scale for readability - now viewport-relative */ --text-lg-practical: clamp(1.125rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.125), 1.5rem); /* 18px - practical readable size */ --text-xl-practical: clamp(1.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.25), 1.75rem); /* 20px */ --text-2xl-practical: clamp(1.5rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.5), 2rem); /* 24px */ --text-3xl-practical: clamp(1.875rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 1.875), 2.5rem); /* 30px */ --text-4xl-practical: clamp(2.25rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 2.25), 3rem); /* 36px */ --text-5xl-practical: clamp(3rem, calc(var(--font-base) * 3), 4rem); /* 48px */ /* Heading Typography - Phi Modular Scale */ --font-h1: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); /* φ² scale */ --font-h2: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi)); /* φ scale */ --font-h3: calc(var(--font-base) * var(--phi-sqrt)); /* √φ scale */ /* Font Weight Scale - Standardized */ --font-weight-normal: 400; /* Normal text */ --font-weight-medium: 500; /* Medium emphasis */ --font-weight-semibold: 600; /* Semibold - cards, buttons */ --font-weight-bold: 700; /* Bold - headings, emphasis */ --font-weight-extrabold: 800; /* Extrabold - hero titles only */ /* Spacing Scale - PHI Derived with Viewport-Relative Units (vh/vw) */ /* All spacing uses vh/vw for proportional scaling across all viewport sizes */ /* Base viewport unit: 1vh = vertical spacing, 1vw = horizontal spacing */ --vbase: calc(1vh + 1vw); /* Combined viewport base for balanced scaling */ --space-1: calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5); /* Base × φ × 0.5 - viewport-relative */ --space-2: calc(var(--space-1) * var(--phi)); /* Base × φ² - viewport-relative */ --space-xs: clamp(0.25vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.5), 0.5vw); /* φ⁻⁴ scaled - minimum 0.25vh, maximum 0.5vw */ --space-sm: clamp(0.5vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-quarter) * 0.75), 1vw); /* φ⁻³ scaled - minimum 0.5vh, maximum 1vw */ --space-md: clamp(0.75vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-half) * 0.5), 1.5vw); /* φ⁻² scaled - minimum 0.75vh, maximum 1.5vw */ --space-lg: clamp(1vh, calc(var(--vbase) * 0.5), 2vw); /* Base unit - φ⁰ = 1 - minimum 1vh, maximum 2vw */ --space-xl: clamp(1.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(2vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ - golden ratio spacing - minimum 1.618vh, maximum 2vw × φ */ --space-2xl: clamp(2.618vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(4vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ² - minimum 2.618vh, maximum 4vw × φ */ --space-3xl: clamp(4.236vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * 0.5), calc(6vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ³ - minimum 4.236vh, maximum 6vw × φ */ --space-4xl: clamp(6.854vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(8vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁴ - minimum 6.854vh, maximum 8vw × φ */ --space-5xl: clamp(11.09vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(12vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁵ - minimum 11.09vh, maximum 12vw × φ */ --space-6xl: clamp(17.944vh, calc(var(--vbase) * var(--phi-cubed) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi) * 0.5), calc(16vw * var(--phi))); /* Base × φ⁶ - minimum 17.944vh, maximum 16vw × φ */ /* PHI Derivative Variations for Element Sizing */ /* Congruence phi - maintaining proportional relationships */ /* Tucker's coefficient of factor congruence with phi symmetry */ --phi-sqrt: 1.272; /* √φ ≈ 1.272 - subtle variation */ --phi-cubed: 4.236; /* φ³ ≈ 4.236 - strong variation */ --phi-half: 0.809; /* φ/2 ≈ 0.809 - gentle reduction */ --phi-quarter: 0.4045; /* φ/4 ≈ 0.4045 - minimal variation */ --phi-two-thirds: 1.079; /* (2φ)/3 ≈ 1.079 - intermediate variation */ --phi-three-quarters: 1.2135; /* (3φ)/4 ≈ 1.2135 - moderate variation */ --phi-one-point-five: 2.427; /* 1.5φ ≈ 2.427 - enhanced variation */ /* Congruence Phi Symmetry - maintaining proportional harmony */ /* Elements maintain phi relationships while allowing individual sizing */ --congruence-phi-1: calc(var(--phi) * 0.618); /* φ × φ⁻¹ = 1 - perfect congruence */ --congruence-phi-2: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi-inv) * var(--phi)); /* Layered congruence for nested elements */ /* Golden Ratio Positioning Variables */ /* For structural positioning relationships, not just spacing */ --phi-ratio: 61.8%; /* Golden ratio proportion (φ⁻¹) */ --phi-ratio-inv: 38.2%; /* Inverse golden ratio (φ⁻²) */ /* === PHI-BASED DESIGN LINES, TANGENTS, AND LATERALS === */ /* Structural design elements using golden ratio geometry */ /* Phi Lines - Golden ratio division lines for structural alignment */ --phi-line-width: clamp(0.5px, calc(0.1vw * var(--phi-inv)), 2px); /* Line width scales with viewport - minimum 0.5px, maximum 2px (enhanced) */ --phi-line-opacity: 0.3; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - subtle, non-invasive */ /* Phi Tangents - Curved lines following golden ratio spiral */ --phi-tangent-radius: calc(100vh * var(--phi-ratio)); /* Tangent radius based on viewport height × phi ratio */ --phi-tangent-opacity: 0.2; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement */ /* Phi Laterals - Horizontal/vertical lines at phi divisions */ --phi-lateral-position-v: var(--phi-ratio); /* Vertical lateral at 61.8% */ --phi-lateral-position-h: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* Horizontal lateral at 38.2% */ --phi-lateral-opacity: var(--opacity-strong); /* Enhanced visibility for laterals */ /* Angular/Azimuth Phi Laterals - Diagonal lines at phi-based angles */ --phi-azimuth-1: 38.2deg; /* First angular lateral angle - inverse phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-2: 61.8deg; /* Second angular lateral angle - phi angle */ --phi-azimuth-3: 23.6deg; /* Third angular lateral angle - phi² angle (φ⁻² × 100) */ --phi-azimuth-4: 76.4deg; /* Fourth angular lateral angle - phi + inverse phi (φ + φ⁻¹) */ --phi-azimuth-opacity: 0.15; /* Reduced opacity for enterprise refinement - very subtle */ --phi-azimuth-1-rad: calc(38.2deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 1 in radians for calculations */ --phi-azimuth-2-rad: calc(61.8deg * 0.0174533); /* Azimuth 2 in radians for calculations */ /* Phi Grid System - For structural alignment */ --phi-grid-cell-v: calc(100vh / var(--phi)); /* Vertical grid cells based on phi division */ --phi-grid-cell-h: calc(100vw / var(--phi)); /* Horizontal grid cells based on phi division */ /* Phi Spiral Points - Key positions along golden spiral */ --phi-spiral-1: 0%; /* Origin */ --phi-spiral-2: var(--phi-ratio-inv); /* 38.2% - first phi division */ --phi-spiral-3: var(--phi-ratio); /* 61.8% - second phi division */ --phi-spiral-4: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv) * var(--phi-inv)); /* 76.4% - third phi division */ --phi-spiral-5: calc(var(--phi-ratio) + var(--phi-ratio-inv)); /* 100% - full cycle */ /* Harmonic Tension Variables - For per-letter semantic styling */ --harmonic-phase-base: 0; --harmonic-tension: var(--phi-inv); /* Base tension value */ --harmonic-frequency: var(--phi); /* Frequency multiplier for harmonic patterns */ /* Wave function system removed - simplified design system */ /* Button Sizes */ --btn-sm: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); /* 12px 16px */ --btn-md: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl); /* 12px 24px */ --btn-lg: var(--space-lg) var(--space-2xl); /* 16px 32px */ /* Icon Sizes */ --icon-sm: 1rem; /* 16px */ --icon-md: 1.25rem; /* 20px */ --icon-lg: 1.5rem; /* 24px */ --icon-xl: 2rem; /* 32px */ /* === IMPORTANCE-BASED SIZING HIERARCHY === */ /* Sizing supersedes by importance - more important = larger */ /* Applied with additive semantics: size + color = combined meaning */ /* Importance Levels - Phi-scaled sizing */ --importance-critical: calc(var(--phi) * var(--phi) * var(--phi)); padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; } /* Improved spacing for touch */ .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } /* Better form input sizing */ input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="tel"], select, textarea { padding: 0.875rem 1rem; font-size: 16px; /* Prevents iOS zoom */ border-radius: 0.5rem; } /* Improved card spacing on mobile */ .card { padding: 1.25rem; } /* Better button spacing */ .btn { padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem; font-size: 1rem; } } /* Keyboard navigation improvements */ .nav-dropdown-toggle:focus + .nav-dropdown-menu, .nav-dropdown-toggle:hover + .nav-dropdown-menu { display: block; } /* Ensure dropdowns are keyboard accessible */ .nav-dropdown:focus-within .nav-dropdown-menu { display: block; } /* High contrast mode support */ @media (prefers-contrast: high) { :root { --primary-color: #0056b3; --text-primary: #000000; --text-secondary: #333333; } *:focus-visible { outline-width: 4px; } } /* Reduced motion support */ @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; } } /* Ensure sufficient color contrast */ .btn-primary { background-color: var(--primary-color); color: white; border: 2px solid var(--primary-color); } .btn-primary:hover, .btn-primary:focus { background-color: var(--primary-dark); border-color: var(--primary-dark); } /* Improve link contrast */ a { color: var(--primary-color); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; } a:hover, a:focus { color: var(--primary-dark); text-decoration-thickness: 2px; } /* Search results accessibility */ .search-result-item { display: block; padding: 1rem; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: all 0.2s; } .search-result-item:focus, .search-result-item:hover { border-color: var(--primary-color); background-color: var(--primary-light); outline: none; } /* Mobile menu accessibility */ .mobile-menu[aria-hidden="true"] { display: none; } .mobile-menu[aria-hidden="false"] { display: block; } /* Hamburger button states */ .hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] { /* Add visual indicator for expanded state */ } .hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] span:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px, 5px); } .hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; } .hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] span:nth-child(3) { transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(7px, -6px); } /* ===== MOBILE RESPONSIVENESS ENHANCEMENTS ===== */ /* Improved mobile typography - prevents zoom on iOS */ @media (max-width: 768px) { /* Ensure inputs don't trigger zoom on iOS */ input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="tel"], input[type="search"], select, textarea { font-size: 16px !important; } /* Better search bar on mobile */ .search-input { font-size: 16px; padding: 0.875rem 1rem; min-height: 48px; } .search-results { max-height: 60vh; overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } /* Improved breadcrumbs on mobile */ .breadcrumbs { font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.75rem 0; } .breadcrumbs ol { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; list-style: none; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .breadcrumbs li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .breadcrumb-separator { color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 0 0.25rem; } .breadcrumbs a { color: var(--primary-color); text-decoration: none; } .breadcrumbs a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .breadcrumb-current span { color: var(--text-primary); font-weight: 500; } /* Better form spacing on mobile */ .inquiry-form { padding: 1.5rem 1rem; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } /* Improved card grid on mobile */ .card-grid { gap: 1rem; } /* Better button sizing on mobile */ .btn { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; font-size: 1rem; } } /* Small mobile devices */ @media (max-width: 480px) { /* Even larger touch targets on small screens */ button, a.btn, .nav-menu a, .mobile-menu a, .filter-btn { min-height: 48px; padding: 0.875rem 1.25rem; } /* Compact spacing on small screens */ .section { padding: 1.5rem 0; } .container { padding: 0 1rem; } /* Better hero on small screens */ .hero { padding: 2rem 1rem; } .hero h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; line-height: 1.3; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; } }
